summary.review_basis: opencpn_s52_spine, s57_structure, S-101 refs where present, Aqua Map refs where present, OpenCPN day renders, Helm candidate SVG/day render
summary.selection_rule: first 50 rows in standard_source_table.json where helm_candidate.candidate_status == pending_judge
top_repair_themes: multi-band beacon/tower/stake rows collapsed to two bands
lateral red/green candidates invented the opposite lateral colour
isolated-danger and safe-water rows used generic beacon bodies instead of known topmark/family cues
tower/lattice rows sometimes lost the tower/lattice body family
metadata labels occasionally conflict with structured S-57 conditions; renderer should follow structure and visual refs

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN/S-52 spine requires the green/white full-chart beacon from COLOUR4,1,4,1: alternating green/white/green/white banding in the BCNGEN beacon body.
verdicts.judge_comments: OpenCPN visual and S-57 conditions both show an alternating multi-band mark; the Helm candidate lost two bands.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a large generic beacon body with only one green band over one white band.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with four ordered horizontal bands green/white/green/white inside the BCNGEN beacon body; keep black outline/stem but do not collapse to two bands.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN68 should read as black/yellow general beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band order and family are recognizable against OpenCPN-only reference.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders black over yellow in the generic beacon body.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional tighten to OpenCPN tiny-chart proportions.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN69 should read as yellow/black general beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Band order and family are recognizable against OpenCPN-only reference.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders yellow over black in the generic beacon body.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional tighten to OpenCPN tiny-chart proportions.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN70 is black/yellow/black cardinal-style banding.
verdicts.judge_comments: The lower black band is absent, changing the cardinal/specialized cue.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders only black over yellow.
verdicts.required_change: Render three ordered horizontal bands black/yellow/black; bottom black band must be visible.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN71 is yellow/black/yellow banding.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate collapses a three-band mark into two bands.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders yellow over black without the lower yellow band.
verdicts.required_change: Render three ordered horizontal bands yellow/black/yellow; bottom yellow band must be visible.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN76 should be black/red/black.
verdicts.judge_comments: The isolated-danger style band sequence is incomplete.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders black over red with no lower black band.
verdicts.required_change: Render three ordered horizontal bands black/red/black in the BCNGEN beacon body.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN79 is an orange/special-purpose general beacon per OpenCPN row.
verdicts.judge_comments: OpenCPN visual is tiny, but S-57 condition COLOUR11 and the candidate agree on single-colour special mark.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a single orange general beacon.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional confirm orange token against the source palette.

verdicts.expected: BCNGEN80 is a black general beacon per COLOUR2 and OpenCPN render.
verdicts.judge_comments: The table label says orange, but the S-57 structure and OpenCPN ref support black; judge follows the structured source.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a single black general beacon.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; correct stale label text that says orange if metadata is refreshed.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN/AquaMap isolated danger beacon cue is two vertically stacked red/black danger balls/dots.
verdicts.judge_comments: S-101 quicklook and OpenCPN render both show the two-dot isolated-danger cue; Helm drew the wrong family.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a red/black trapezoid beacon without isolated-danger balls.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the isolated-danger beacon symbol: two aligned circular danger marks/topmarks, matching S-101/OpenCPN, not a striped generic beacon.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN BCNLAT15 is a simple red major lateral beacon mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate invents green on a red lateral mark.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders red over green bands.
verdicts.required_change: Remove green band; render red lateral beacon body with the S-101/OpenCPN black pivot/detail cue if needed.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN BCNLAT16 is a simple green major lateral beacon mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate invents red on a green lateral mark.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders green over red bands.
verdicts.required_change: Remove red band; render green lateral beacon body with the S-101/OpenCPN cue.

verdicts.expected: BCNLAT21 should be a minor red lateral beacon/pole mark, not red-green banded.
verdicts.judge_comments: S-101/OpenCPN indicate a red minor lateral mark; candidate adds green and uses generic body.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders red over green bands.
verdicts.required_change: Remove green band and use the compact minor lateral red beacon/stake geometry from S-101/OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: BCNLAT22 should be a minor green lateral beacon/pole mark, not green-red banded.
verdicts.judge_comments: S-101/OpenCPN indicate a green minor lateral mark; candidate adds red.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders green over red bands.
verdicts.required_change: Remove red band and use compact minor lateral green beacon/stake geometry from S-101/OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: BCNLAT23 should be the red-green lateral bifurcation mark shown by OpenCPN, without unrelated black/blue bands.
verdicts.judge_comments: The candidate includes colours not present in the row source structure.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders red/green/black/blue bands.
verdicts.required_change: Render only the ordered red/green lateral cue indicated by the OpenCPN reference and lookup; remove black/blue bands.

verdicts.expected: OpenCPN river beacon stake/pole reference is a compact black stake/pole cue, not blue-banded.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate reused a generic spar palette instead of the OpenCPN stake cue.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a black/blue spar body.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as a plain black river stake/pole beacon; remove blue fill and keep stake proportions.

verdicts.expected: BCNLTC01 is a lattice beacon; S-101/OpenCPN show black lattice/tower structure, not blue-banded generic fill.
verdicts.judge_comments: The body family is the important cue here and it is missing.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a generic black/blue trapezoid beacon.
verdicts.required_change: Draw the lattice beacon/tower structure in black using thin OpenBridge-style strokes; remove blue band.

verdicts.expected: Safe-water beacon should carry the safe-water cue from S-101/AquaMap/OpenCPN, not a black general beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: All provider refs disagree with the black generic body.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a solid black generic beacon body.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw from S-101/AquaMap safe-water reference: preserve the safe-water topmark/body cue and correct red/white semantics.

verdicts.expected: Minor safe-water beacon should carry the safe-water cue from S-101/AquaMap/OpenCPN.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate fails the known safe-water symbol family.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a solid black generic beacon body.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw minor safe-water beacon from S-101/OpenCPN, preserving the safe-water cue and not using a solid black general body.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN major special-purpose beacon is a yellow beacon mark, not yellow/black banded.
verdicts.judge_comments: The extra black band changes the meaning.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders yellow over black bands.
verdicts.required_change: Remove black lower band; render yellow special-purpose beacon with the compact S-101/OpenCPN body.

verdicts.expected: S-101/OpenCPN minor special-purpose beacon is yellow with minor beacon/stake proportions.
verdicts.judge_comments: Candidate is a generic two-band beacon, not the minor special-purpose mark.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders yellow over black bands.
verdicts.required_change: Remove black band and use minor yellow special-purpose beacon geometry.

verdicts.expected: BCNSPR62 should read as a yellow spar beacon.
verdicts.judge_comments: Single-colour spar family is recognizable.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a yellow spar/stake beacon.
verdicts.required_change: No semantic repair required; optional tighten height/outline to OpenCPN.

verdicts.expected: BCNSTK02 stake/pole reference is a compact black stake/pole cue.

verdicts.required_change: Remove blue band; redraw as the black minor stake/pole beacon shown by S-101/OpenCPN.
